blogs.title: Customer Behaviour Analysis
blogs.excerpt: A complete Data Analytics Project focused on understanding customer behaviour through data exploration, cleaning, analysis, and visualization using Python, SQL, Power BI, and Excel.
blogs.content:
рџ§  Customer Behaviour Analysis
Turning Raw Data into Business Insights

In todayвЂ™s data-driven world, understanding customer behaviour is not just an advantageвЂ”itвЂ™s a necessity. Businesses that leverage data effectively can optimize marketing strategies, improve customer retention, and boost revenue.

In this project, I performed a complete end-to-end data analytics workflow to uncover meaningful insights from customer data using tools like Python, SQL, Power BI, and Excel.

рџ“Љ Project Objective

The goal of this project was to:

Analyze customer purchasing patterns
Segment customers based on behavior
Identify high-value customers
Generate actionable insights for business decision-making
рџ§° Tools & Technologies Used
Tool	Purpose
рџђЌ Python	Data cleaning, transformation, EDA, and visualization
рџ—ѓпёЏ SQL	Data querying, aggregation, and segmentation
рџ“€ Power BI	Interactive dashboards and storytelling
рџ“Љ Excel	Data validation, pivot tables, and quick analysis
рџ“Ѓ Project Architecture

The project follows a structured and scalable workflow:

Customer-Behaviour-Analysis/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ raw/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ cleaned/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ notebooks/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 01_data_cleaning.ipynb
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 02_exploratory_analysis.ipynb
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ 03_modeling.ipynb
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ sql/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ customer_queries.sql
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ reports/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ PowerBI_Dashboard.pbix
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Excel_Analysis.xlsx
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ visuals/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ dashboard_preview.png
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ requirements.txt
в””в”Ђв”Ђ README.md
рџ”Ќ Step-by-Step Approach
1пёЏвѓЈ Data Collection

Customer transaction and demographic data were collected from databases and CSV files.

2пёЏвѓЈ Data Cleaning & Transformation

Using Pandas, I:

Handled missing values and duplicates
Standardized inconsistent formats
Converted date columns for time-based analysis
3пёЏвѓЈ Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)

With Matplotlib and Seaborn, I explored:

Customer spending distribution
Product performance
Seasonal sales trends
Correlations between variables
4пёЏвѓЈ SQL-Based Analysis

Using SQL, I:

Segmented customers based on purchase behavior
Created aggregated metrics using GROUP BY
Used JOINs and window functions for deeper insights
5пёЏвѓЈ Data Visualization (Power BI)

Built an interactive dashboard featuring:

рџ“€ Sales trends over time
рџ‘Ґ Customer segmentation (age, region, spending)
рџ›ЌпёЏ Product category performance
рџ’° Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)
6пёЏвѓЈ Excel Reporting

Created:

Pivot tables
Summary dashboards
Business-friendly reports for stakeholders
рџ“Љ Key Insights

Here are some impactful findings from the analysis:

рџ”№ Pareto Principle (80/20 Rule)

Around 20% of customers contribute to ~75% of total revenue

рџ”№ High-Value Customer Segment

Customers aged 25вЂ“40 show the highest loyalty and repeat purchases

рџ”№ Top Product Categories

Electronics and Home Appliances dominate recurring sales

рџ”№ Regional Trends

Urban customers have significantly higher repeat purchase rates

рџ’Ў Business Recommendations

Based on the insights:

рџЋЇ Focus marketing campaigns on high-value customers
рџ”Ѓ Implement loyalty programs for repeat buyers
рџ“Ќ Target urban regions for expansion strategies
рџ›’ Optimize inventory for top-performing categories
рџљЂ How to Run This Project
git clone https://github.com/yourusername/customer-behaviour-analysis.git
cd customer-behaviour-analysis
pip install -r requirements.txt
рџ§‘вЂЌрџ’» About Me

Saurav
Data Analyst | Python | SQL | Power BI | Excel

рџ“§ sauravmourya54@gmail.com

рџ”— LinkedIn | GitHub

вњЁ Final Thoughts

This project demonstrates how raw data can be transformed into actionable business insights through a structured analytics approach.

From cleaning messy datasets to building interactive dashboards, every step plays a crucial role in telling a meaningful data story.

рџ’¬ If you found this useful or have feedback, feel free to connect or reach out!
